name: Turkey Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cup No Yolks egg noodle substitute, cooked
2 cups skim milk, at room temperature
2 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a saucepan, melt margarine over medium-high heat.
4. Sprinkle flour over the melted margarine and cook for 2 minutes, whisking quickly and constantly.
5. Whisk in skim milk and parmesan cheese. Cook, stirring constantly for another 2 minutes until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and add noodles, chicken, onions, bell peppers, and mustard to the saucepan. Toss to mix well.
7. Spoon the mixture into the prepared casserole dish and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until browned and bubbly.
